  "text": "func CreateNewAccountCli(t testing.TB, loginName string) (string, string) {
n1: 	c, err := loadConfig()
n2: 	require.NoError(t, err)

n3: 	ctx := context.Background()
n4: 	password, err := base62.Random(16)
n5: 	require.NoError(t, err)
n6: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		e2e.WithArgs(
			"accounts", "create", "password",
			"-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
			"-login-name", loginName,
			"-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
			"-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
			"-description", "e2e Account",
			"-format", "json",
		),
		e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
	)
n7: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

n8: 	var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
n9: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
n10: 	require.NoError(t, err)

n11: 	newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
n12: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
		AuthenticateAdminCli(t)
		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
			e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
		)
		require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
	})

n13: 	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)

n14: 	return newAccountId, password
}
"
}

ops.body:
c, err := loadConfig()
require.NoError(t, err)

password, err := base62.Random(16)
require.NoError(t, err)

output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
	 e2e.WithArgs(
		 "accounts", "create", "password",
		 "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
		 "-login-name", loginName,
		 "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
		 "-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
		 "-description", "e2e Account",
		 "-format", "json",
	),
	 e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
)
require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
require.NoError(t, err)

newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
t.Cleanup(func() {
	 AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
	 output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		 e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
	)
	 require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
})
	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)
return newAccountId, password

c, err := loadConfig()
require.NoError(t, err)

password, err := base62.Random(16)
require.NoError(t, err)

output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
	 e2e.WithArgs(
		 "accounts", "create", "password",
		 "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
		 "-login-name", loginName,
		 "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
		 "-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
		 "-description", "e2e Account",
		 "-format", "json",
	),
	 e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
)
require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
require.NoError(t, err)

newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
t.Cleanup(func() {
	 AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
	 output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		 e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
	)
	 require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
})
	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)
return newAccountId, password

c, err := loadConfig()
require.NoError(t, err)

password, err := base62.Random(16)
require.NoError(t, err)

output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
	 e2e.WithArgs(
		 "accounts", "create", "password",
		 "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
		 "-login-name", loginName,
		 "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
		 "-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
		 "-description", "e2e Account",
		 "-format", "json",
	),
	 e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
)
require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
require.NoError(t, err)

newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
t.Cleanup(func() {
	 AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
	 output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		 e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
	)
	 require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
})
	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)
return newAccountId, password

ops.body:
c, err := loadConfig()
require.NoError(t, err)

password, err := base62.Random(16)
require.NoError(t, err)

output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
	 e2e.WithArgs(
		 "accounts", "create", "password",
		 "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
		 "-login-name", loginName,
		 "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
		 "-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
		 "-description", "e2e Account",
		 "-format", "json",
	),
	 e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
)
require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
require.NoError(t, err)

newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
t.Cleanup(func() {
	 AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
	 output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		 e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
	)
	 require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
})
	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)
return newAccountId, password

  "view": {
    "generation": 4,
    "nodes": 4,
    "text": "func AuthenticateCli(t testing.TB, loginName string, password string, ctx context.Context) {\nn1: \tc, err := loadConfig()\nn2: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\nn3: \toutput := e2e.RunCommand(context.Background(), \"boundary\",\n\t\te2e.WithArgs(\n\t\t\t\"authenticate\", \"password\",\n\t\t\t\"-addr\", c.Address,\n\t\t\t\"-auth-method-id\", c.AuthMethodId,\n\t\t\t\"-login-name\", loginName,\n\t\t\t\"-password\", \"env://E2E_TEST_BOUNDARY_PASSWORD\",\n\t\t),\n\t\te2e.WithEnv(\"E2E_TEST_BOUNDARY_PASSWORD\", password),\n\t)\nn4: \trequire.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))\n}\n"

ops.body:
c, err := loadConfig()
require.NoError(t, err)

AuthenticateCli(t, c.AdminLoginName, c.AdminLoginPassword, ctx)

c, err := loadConfig()
require.NoError(t, err)

output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
	 e2e.WithArgs(
		 "authenticate", "password",
		 "-addr", c.Address,
		 "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
		 "-login-name", loginName,
		 "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_BOUNDARY_PASSWORD",
	),
	 e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_BOUNDARY_PASSWORD", password),
)
require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

c, err := loadConfig()
require.NoError(t, err)

password, err := base62.Random(16)
require.NoError(t, err)

output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
	 e2e.WithArgs(
		 "accounts", "create", "password",
		 "-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
		 "-login-name", loginName,
		 "-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
		 "-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
		 "-description", "e2e Account",
		 "-format", "json",
	),
	 e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
)
require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
require.NoError(t, err)

newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
t.Cleanup(func() {
	 AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
	 output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		 e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
	)
	 require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
})
	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)
return newAccountId, password
